"'''Lan Barell'''" is an article written by [[Paul Sudlow]] with illustrations by [[Tim Eldred]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' ''1'']] in [[February]] [[1994]] by [[West End Games]].

==Contents==
This article serves as a supplementary piece for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', focusing on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lan Barell/Legends|Lan Barell]], located at the end of the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]]. It explores the [[Barellian]] society, its economic history and the political system. The article also introduces the [[Qieg/Legends|Qieg]], the native species of Lan Barell as well as several cities, settlements and notable terrains across the planet.
